'''Serom Haxan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Lorrdian/Legends|Lorrdian]] [[Professor/Legends|professor]] at the [[University of Pangalactic Cultural Studies]] during the years after the [[Dark Nest Crisis]]. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], Haxan was taken hostage by his colleague, Professor [[Movac Arisster]]. Taking Haxan atop the aquarium of the [[Lorrd Academy for Aquatic Studies]], Arisster strapped Haxan to his back, threatening to blow the aquarium up if he did not talk to [[Nelani Dinn]], the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] stationed onplanet. When [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] arrived and refused to negotiate with Arisster, Solo used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to detonate the bomb, [[Death/Legends|killing]] both men.
